tasks.title: Fix: restore test files deleted by workspace-bot regression (c29643f)
tasks.description: The workspace auto-save bot (AGI Holdings Bot) accidentally committed deletions of 6 test files + events.ts + multicall.ts from the inkd repo in commit c29643f. Restored all files from their original commits. Root cause: workspace-level git add -A ran from within builds/inkd-protocol, picking up unintended deletes.
tasks.result: Restored: events.ts, multicall.ts, events.test.ts, multicall.test.ts, encryption.test.ts (206 lines), InkdClient.connectArweave.test.ts, token.test.ts, watch.test.ts. Quality gate: Contracts 159/159 ✅  SDK 281/281 ✅  CLI 276/276 ✅  Total: 716 tests.

notes: All non-blocked tasks done. Blocked: React hooks (needs jsdom/testing-library). Remaining low-coverage CLI files: agentd.ts (daemon/long-running process, hard to unit test), index.ts (CLI entry dispatcher, expected). IMPORTANT: workspace auto-save bot must not run git add -A from builds/inkd-protocol — it deletes tracked test files. Consider adding builds/ to workspace .gitignore or use a separate commit script for inkd builds.
